subject: A horned minotaur shaman priest, bare-chested with a muscular build, holding a curved blade aloft against a backdrop of red sky and smoke.
description: A bare-chested minotaur with long curving horns and a fierce expression stands at center, raising a curved blade in one hand. His skin is reddish-tan, and he wears simple dark wraps and ritual ornamentation. The background blazes with red and orange — smoke, fire-lit sky, and the diffuse glow of an ongoing slaughter or sacrificial pyre. The composition is a tight mid-shot foregrounding the priest's torso, horned head, and upraised weapon. The palette is dominated by reds, blacks, and ember-orange highlights, with the figure half-silhouetted against the burning sky.
foreground: Horned minotaur priest with curved blade raised, bare torso, dark ritual wraps.
background: Red and orange sky filled with smoke and firelight, suggesting a battlefield or pyre.
emotion: wrathful, zealous, exultant in violence — bared teeth and raised weapon convey ritual fury.
